response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the technical requirements — strong TypeScript/Node.js, React, Kubernetes, AWS, and recent LLM/MCP agent-tooling experience map directly onto the required and nice-to-have skills. However, with roughly 18 years of experience and recent Staff/Senior titles, she is significantly overqualified for an entry-level position, raising real concerns about compensation fit, engagement with junior-scoped work, and long-term retention. Worth a conversation only if she explicitly understands and accepts the role's seniority and on-site expectations.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js and React experience across multiple recent roles
Nice-to-haves covered: LLM/API integration, Kubernetes, AWS, GIS/mapping platform work
Proven fullstack ownership from database to UI, plus testing and clean-architecture focus
concerns: Heavily overqualified for an entry-level role — retention and motivation risk
Likely salary expectations far above a junior/mid budget
No explicit PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience listed (MongoDB/MySQL instead)

key_factors.factor: Technical stack match (TypeScript, React, AWS, K8s, LLM)
